programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon,but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A mysterious dome blocks Mateo and the others from leaving their dream landing, and Zoey and Albert are their only hope of escape.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: With Albert captured by the Night Hunter and Z-Blob detained by Agent Strick, it's time for a dual rescue in the Waking World and the Dream World!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Detective Izzie takes the case of Mateo's missing comic book while Nova, the head of the Insomniacs, probes into a mystery of her own.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The hunt for the Sandman, the only one who can repair Lunia's hourglass, brings the kids to the dangerous Murky Realm, where memories go to die!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Determined to give the Insomniac's a night of good dreams, Izzie and friends bring them to the Candy Realm; but nowhere is safe from Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen scrambles to shut down O.O.P.S.I. before it can do real damage, while Claire and the others hunt the escaped twin dinosaurs ... only to become hunted themselves!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: O.O.P.S.I., the new artificial intelligence running the Park, goes dangerously off the rails, while a thief posing as an intern steals two eggs that contain a new species of dinosaur inside!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly’s Boarding School, they discover it’s a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon’s new Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth’s Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn’t have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock’ and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon’s Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Determined to give the Insomniac's a night of good dreams, Izzie and friends bring them to the Candy Realm; but nowhere is safe from Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to crack the code to reveal Lunia's secrets while the Nightmare King presses a full-scale assault on Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Nightmare King begins to open a rift to the Waking World while Mateo presses Oz for the truth about Lunia's battle with the Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A night terror is on the hunt at the fall festival and so is the Night Hunter, who appears in the Waking World with a brand-new threat for Mateo.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Missing Z-Blob, Mateo tries to free him to the neglect of his dream chaser duties while the team wrestles with an incursion case and a flock of unusual ravens ignites Izzie's suspicions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras de aprendizaje! Desde medirse hasta divertirse en la granja, la construcción de formas, revisiones oculares, animales del mundo y sorprender a mamá y papá, ¡es un día de descubrimientos y alegría!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día de aventuras con Little Angel! Desde aprender a comer sano hasta ordenar, pasando por la construcción, la seguridad a la hora de comer, consejos para cuidar niños y trucos de astucia, ¡es un viaje de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus divertidas aventuras. Desde paseos en camión hasta misterios con calcetines, zapatos apestosos, magia con helados, rugidos de dinosaurios, la hora de dormir y los superpoderes de mamá: ¡un día de diversión e imaginación!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Disfruta el día con Little Angel explorando el zoológico y aprendiendo sobre los animales y sus hábitos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un viaje de coraje y valentía, en el que aprenderán a enfrentarse a nuevos retos con una sonrisa y con confianza.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Little Angel te invita a unirte a sus divertidas aventuras con canciones. Prepárate para cantar, bailar y reír mientras le dan vida a las canciones infantiles clásicas de la forma más divertida.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus tiernos viajes. Desde el amor entre hermanos hasta la perseverancia, pasando por la alegría de los cumpleaños, la diversión en el salón y la salud, ¡todo un tesoro de lecciones envueltas en amor y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para un armonioso viaje con los Little Angels mientras se sumergen en el mundo de las emociones. Con una melodía pegadiza y un poco de magia, convierten las lágrimas en sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un divertido viaje lleno de chapuzones sobre la natación segura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una actividad familiar. Jugarán y crearán recuerdos para toda la vida.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/10/21: Kyle Schwarber and Kiké Hernández crush solo home runs early in the game, then Christian Vázquez hits a walk-off two-run home run in the bottom of the 13th inning in Game 3 of the ALDS

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/21: Rafael Devers launches a three-run home run in the 3rd inning, then Kiké Hernández lifts a walk-off sacrifice fly in the 9th inning to take down the Rays and send the Red Sox to the American League Championship Series.

programme.title: Wrigley Field 100 Years
programme.desc: Celebrate a century of the greatest moments and best personalities from the Cubs' historic ballpark. The ivy wall and renditions of "Take Me Out to the Ballgame" are just a couple of features that make Wrigley Field one of the game's best stadiums.

programme.title: Inside the Moments
programme.desc: On this episode of Inside the Moments, take a look at some of the icons that transcended the game of baseball, featuring Jackie Robinson, Satchel Paige, and more.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, Goose Gossage looks to help improve the Padres' bullpen, the Pirates hope for an ace in John Tudor, and Harold Baines leads the White Sox.

programme.title: MLB Ultimate Lineup
programme.desc: Check out The Greatest Postseason Comebacks We Ever Saw! From the 2004 Red Sox to the 2003 Marlins, these clubs shocked the baseball world with incredible come-from-behind victories.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2021: The Dodgers beat the Giants, 2-1, in Game 5 of the 2021 National League Division Series thanks to an RBI single from Cody Bellinger in the top of the 9th inning and an unlikely save from Max Scherzer.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/2021: Jose Altuve ties the game with his 20th career postseason homer, then Carlos Correa hits a go-ahead shot in the 7th inning to lead the Astros to a Game 1 victory over the Red Sox.

programme.title: MST3K: The Giant Spider Invasion
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots suffer through The Giant Spider Invasion (1975).

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Nick wants to take Kay out on a date, but isn't sure what they'd do. The short offers ideas like taffy pulls and scavenger sales. Nothing says romantic quite like a scavenger sale.

programme.title: MST3K: I Accuse My Parents
programme.desc: A young man gets mixed up with a crime syndicate and blames his inattentive parents. The 1940s-era documentary short explains the then-new techniques that enabled farmers to rush produce to market.

programme.title: Laserblast
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a laser weapon left behind by turtle-like aliens. He uses it for petty revenge, but the weapon slowly changes his personality.

programme.desc: Advance your career by finishing this enlightening two-part short featuring timeless sales advice.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Madison must lease the beach home of a tenant with six dogs; Madison accuses Josh Altman of trying to undermine his business.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Madison confronts Josh Altman; Josh Flagg gets ready to publish his new book.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: A potential client shows Josh Altman his Hollywood Hills bachelor's den; Madison gives Heather an ultimatum.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: A home owned by an eccentric inventor; a stunning lakeside home; Josh Flagg meets a client at rooftop yoga.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Heather's relationship with Josh Altman begins to interfere with her work; Madison accuses Heather of sabotaging his business; a young socialite asks Josh Flagg to find her a high-end hideout.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Madison crashes Josh Altman's broker's open to confront him; Josh Flagg's grandmother bonds with a client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman's temper runs short, causing him to miss a huge listing; Madison concocts a plan to sell his family home; one of Josh Flagg's clients threatens to back out of a deal.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Both Joshes face personal and professional perils including a family friend with sad news for Josh Flagg and desperation for a new listing for Josh Altman; Madison may be sabotaged when a developer insists on showing his property during construction.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman takes Orlando Scandrick as a client, but Scandrick's business manager makes it tough; Madison's assistant makes an unexpected demand.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In a battle with organized crime, the IMF sets up a bizarre mind-transfer experiment to convince a syndicate leader he is being double-crossed on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF turns itself into a surgical team to operate on a tyrannical ruler who has imprisoned the rightful king, his twin brother, on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: As a doctor with a startling new treatment for amnesia, Jim Phelps forces Paris to relive another man's past when the IMF pushes a search for stolen nuclear material on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest stars Noel Harrison and Diane Baker are drawn into a daring IMF charade that uses a trained falcon to help in a crown jewel theft in the first of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney is blinded in an accident, a bride-to-be is buried alive and Paris poses as a man he is unaware is marked for death in the second of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A trained falcon is summoned in a last-ditch rescue attempt when Jim Phelps finds his IMF endangered by a traitor's assassination plot in the last of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers enters wearing a reindeer hat complete with antlers. King Friday declares that everyone in the Neighborhood must wear at hat. Andy Holiner and Alice Johnson sing with some young friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a Randy S. Caribou figure made of clay. Then, visiting a nearby soccer field, Mister Rogres meets Dave Bartholomae, a coach who is holding practice with his young players.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a basket from a Native American friend who keeps it near his door for friends to "put burdens here and come inside." Bob Dog invites King Friday to join their game, a first such invitation for the king.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Suzie McConnell comes to give Mister Rogers a basketball lesson. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is welcomed to be part of a team and given team uniforms.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely go bowling where they not only have a chance to bowl, but also to see how pins and balls are set up.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the San Diego Wild Animal Park where guide Joan Embery shows him giraffes, elephants, tigers and other animals living there.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a film processing plant to learn how people turn an unexposed roll of film into finished photographs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Neighborhood of Make-Believe presents "Josephine the Short-Neck Giraffe," a musical story for children by Mister Rogers!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: The special 3-part musical story for children continues as Josephine and Hazel Elephant enroll at the School for Growing, where they meet a snake who can't hiss, an elephant with stripes, and a very shy giraffe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: "Josephine the Short-Neck Giraffe" concludes today as shy J. R. Giraffe helps Josephine learn to accept herself just the way she is.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps out at Negri's Nusic Shop when Helena leaves to care for her sick son. Queen Sara learns that an employee of "Food for the World" is sick and her help is needed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely show how they make an apple-peanut butter treat and remind children how much they learn from people other than their parents.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make peanut butter. Lady Aberlin agrees to take care of Daphne. Henrietta Pussycat suggests making a daycare center at the factory, and Corney agrees.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist. She shows pictures of her children and says she expresses her feelings for them through her music. Prince Tuesday is considering getting sick so that his parents will stay home from work.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett invites Mister Rogers outside for some exercises. Bruce Franco carries a collection of balloon scuptures he has made for the party. He gives Mister Rogers a balloon sculpture that looks like the Neighborhood Trolley.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment. He shows how things can be reused. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, there's a real-life problem -- too much garbage -- and the neighbors are trying to find a solution.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make adhesive bandages. Prince Tuesday is looking for someone to play with but all of his friends are busy. At the suggestion of King Friday, he pretends that his rag doll has come to life.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Yo-Yo Ma describes how he misses his family when he is gone and plays Bach's Sarabande on his cello. Sitting at the piano, Yo-Yo's son Nicholas plays the Skater's Waltz as a duet with his father.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must find the clues when young female professionals dressed as dolls turn up dead on public transit. Jane also learns more about how Casey (CHRIS VANCE) was injured.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane looks for how Maura can meet her biological mother, Dr. Hope Davis (SHARON LAWRENCE). A nun from Jane and Frankie Jr.'s past returns. JENNY O'HARA guest stars.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: When an affluent man is found murdered, Jane and Maura must figure out if it's related to his company. Angela and Lt. Det. Cavanaugh continue their flirtatious relationship.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Country singer CRAIG MORGAN guest stars.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A bride is killed just before she walks down the aisle, and Jane and Maura are on the case. Plus, Jane has a new neighbor who captures the attention of Angela, Frankie and Frost.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A boy band star is murdered. Jane and Frankie, who grew up with the victim, work to solve the case. Plus, will Angela learn the truth about Lydia's (ALEXANDRA HOLDEN) pregnancy?

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: In the summer finale, when a statue breaks open to reveal a dead woman inside, Jane and Maura must find the killer quickly. Plus, Dennis (EDDIE CIBRIAN) returns for Maura.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda juggles a Hollywood murder investigation with a surprise visit from her parents (recurring guest stars FRANCES STERNHAGEN and BARRY CORBIN).

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda's squad investigates a double-homicide involving a Tijuana drug cartel and police corruption. Plus, an article paints an unflattering picture of Priority Homicide.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: After the death of a teenager who was killed by a pipe bomb, the squad races against the clock to prevent an explosive massacre in the summer finale.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda's parents (recurring guest stars BARRY CORBIN and FRANCES STERNHAGEN) visit, but when a murder investigation interrupts the visit, Brenda brings them along.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: The body of someone extremely overweight turns up in the trunk of a car. When the team finally tracks down a witness, they get quite a shock.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: When a woman is found brutally raped and murdered in her home, all eyes turn toward a known sex offender. BILLY BURKE ("Twilight," "24") guest stars.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: AMY SEDARIS ("Strangers with Candy") guest stars as Fritz's sister, Claire, who claims to be psychic and tags along on an investigation of a possible homicide.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: As Callen continues hunting Katya, Kilbride enlists NCIS to help find a truckload of stolen guns. The assignment becomes more challenging when their suspect, the son of a mob boss they believe was planning to sell them, is found dead.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When an NCIS mission to protect a compromised undercover agent goes completely sideways, the agents are individually interrogated to find out what really happened. Also, Kilbride must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam negotiates and Rountree goes undercover, when a man takes a busload of hostages and threatens to blow it up unless his daughter's war crimes are posthumously cleared.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: NCIS investigates the apparent suicide of a Navy intelligence officer who leapt to his death after taking LSD. Also, while Kensi is away, Deeks makes plans to redo the backyard without her input.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The NCIS team scrambles to find Kensi, when she is attacked and kidnapped by a mysterious militia group while helping a group of migrants cross the border.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: One month after Director Vance was kidnapped, Gibbs is assigned the role of acting director in his absence while the team searches worldwide for his whereabouts, on the 16th season premiere.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a Navy lieutenant is found murdered in his hot tub, the team interviews several families in the victim's peculiar neighborhood. Also, Torres must face the consequences after a volatile night out with Palmer.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: One of the NCIS agents is starstruck after the team investigates an explosion outside the home of Navy Petty Officer First Class Todd Nicholas (Cameron Radice) and his wife, popular reality TV star Sheba Nicholas (Tara Holt).

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs' quiet vacation at his remote cabin is interrupted by a surprise visit from Tobias Fornell (Joe Spano) and Navy Captain Phillip Brooks (Don Lake), as well as a call from NCIS asking for his help locating a robber hiding in the woods near him.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a 50-year-old tape recording left by a murder victim is found, the NCIS team tries to exonerate Ray Jennings (Charlie Robinson), the Marine serving a life sentence for the crime.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS arrives at a Halloween crime scene, Torres recognizes the victim as a former friend from federal law enforcement training. Also, Jimmy thinks his lab is haunted by ghosts when objects keep mysteriously moving.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a mural by a street artist and activist is stolen, the NCIS investigation leads to a conspiracy regarding a Navy contractor and the safety of ocean mammals. Also, Bishop shares a special connection with the street artist.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee and Bishop travel to Afghanistan after a murder case in the states is linked to a string of soldiers killed by friendly fire overseas. Also, Kasie leaves the lab and accompanies Torres into the field to process additional forensic evidence.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the lead suspect of an unsolved and high-profile robbery case is released from prison, the NCIS team resumes their investigation with an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mysteries of ninjutsu enthrall the Straw Hats as Raizo, the implausible ninja, makes his true powers known! Meanwhile, a mysterious artifact points the way towards the end of the Grand Line!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of the Ponegliffs is revealed - their true significance, and the story of their creation, leads closer to the Straw Hats than they might have imagined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed - and the samurai propose an alliance to help topple Kaido! But Luffy's response will shock the crew... and force the young daimyo to take responsibility!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plans are set! The Straw Hats divide and conquer, one group heading to save Sanji, the others to the Land of Wano! But in the final moments before their departure, the tremendous elephant island begins to quake!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After being aggressively attacked by Jack's fleet, the monstrous Zunesha comes to life and beckons to those on its back! But can the Straw Hats understand its cry? And realize in time what the elephant island needs from them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the skirmish with Jack now over, the Straw Hats move on to trying to bandage the great elephant's wounds! But just as the whole island puts the plan into action, unseen danger lurks on horizon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and the others split up into four teams, each on different missions! Some from the Mink Tribe insist on leaving with Luffy's team! Meanwhile, Usopp makes a weapon for Nami that seems to work like magic!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's team sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji! But they didn't realize there is one more crewmember than they have bargained for!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot stows away! And settles in with the Straw Hats as they make their way to rescue Sanji! Meanwhile, in the Sakura Kingdom, Dalton and Kureha are getting ready for the Reverie so as their former enemy in his newly-built kingdom…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of the raid on the Revolutionary Army reaches Luffy! But that's the least of their worries as they face a storm and a sudden lack of provisions! Meanwhile, Emperor Kaido fumes with anger at the reckless generation of upstarts!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sneaking in to the Navy island facility to replenish their food supply, Luffy and the others risk being caught out in the open! Will their infamy make them easy to spot by the hotheaded Navy recruits around them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The jig is up as Luffy and the others make a daring dash to avoid the furious Navy! Can they escape without having to turn to fight - and after they've had a chance to raid the cabinets for food?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Making a mad dash for the Submerge with the food they stole, Luffy and the others have to get through some of the Navy's upstart soldiers! Grount, whose arm holds incredible power, summons his training to challenge Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: Ghost Stories

programme.desc: A paranoid mathematician searches for a key number that will unlock the universal patterns found in nature. Pushed to his limits, he spirals between brilliance and obsession in this gripping, groundbreaking debut from Darren Aronofsky.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Four years after a terrifying mutation took New York City by surprise, a detective stumbles upon a link between the "mimic" creatures and three grisly new murder victims. The shape-shifting bugs are back.

programme.title: Mimic 3: Sentinel
programme.desc: In the third creature feature in the MIMIC franchise, the bugs are back. After a group of people begin to disappear, a man hypersensitive to germs and confined to a protective bubble, decides to play detective.

programme.title: The Remains of the Day
programme.desc: Oscar®-winners Anthony Hopkins (The Silence of the Lambs) and Emma Thompson (Howards End) reunite with the acclaimed Merchant Ivory filmmaking team for this extraordinary and moving story of blind devotion and repressed love. Rated PG

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: Night Catches Us
programme.desc: Philadelphia, 1976. After years of mysterious absence, Marcus returns to the neighborhood where he came of age in the midst of the Black Power movement. While his arrival raises suspicion among his family and former neighbors.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Defiance

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Two Russian and German snipers play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad.

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church commands the knight to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Jarrod and Elaine travel to Los Angeles to meet his friend Terry and his wife Candice. Terry gives a party in his apartment for Jarrod. The next morning, the group is awakened by beams of light. The group of friends try to escape from the alien invaders.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.desc: Brent has his first taste of Mauritius curry. The Indian population has a large influence on the cuisine.

programme.title: Brent Owens Unwraps Mauritius

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen

programme.title: I'll Have What Phil's Having

programme.desc: Anthony travels to Tokyo, where he begins in the Tsujiki market and then is introduced to techniques in preparing edaomae sushi. He also learns the diets of Sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam: After taking a cyclo ride through Ho Chi Minh City and trying various foods from roadside vendors and markets, Tony tests his might with a few shots of snake wine and a live cobra heart.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Mekong River, Vietnam: On the river, Tony drinks a lot of Mekong moonshine with the welcoming owners of a duck farm. Although seduced by his Vietnam experience, Tony is not sure the royal dish Birds Nest Soup is all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia: With a friend along for the ride, Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, where he explores a food culture that is both pleasing to the palette and slightly frightening.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia and Japan: Taking his obsession with the film Apocalypse Now a little too seriously, Tony sets out for Pailin reputed to be one of the most dangerous towns on earth. After his journey, Tony returns to Japan.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: This multi-cultural city is explored through its traditional food.

programme.title: Licence to Grill

programme.title: The Reading

programme.desc: A Message from Brianna

programme.title: Succubus
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: Pet
programme.desc: A young waitress engages in psychological warfare with the lonely man who abducts her, revealing the darkness lurking in each of them.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw

programme.title: The Getaway

programme.title: The Sea of Trees

programme.title: Limitless

programme.title: Panic Room
programme.desc: When her home is invaded by three armed robbers, a divorced woman and her young daughter hide in their specially designed panic room but end up in a deadly cat-and-mouse game anyway.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: Pain & Gain

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We leave the eternal city behind by way of the famous Appian Way to explore the environs of Rome. First, it's the majesty of Emperor Hadrian's villa and the wine and lakes of the Alban Hills. Next, it's south to the ancient seaport of Ostia.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: Mexico City, the world's largest metropolis, is modern, crowded, cosmopolitan, and steeped in tradition. Rudy begins with Mexico's ancient roots just outside the city at pre-Aztec Teotihuacán.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: The Champagne region of France bubbles over with fine wine, gourmet cuisine, picturesque towns, and gothic spires. We base in Reims, home of the historic cathedral where French kings were crowned. From Reims, we tour wine country.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: The port city of San Francisco revels in art, diversity, and food. Chinatown is a feast for the senses, and the city's new Asian Art Museum a must-see. We get savvy on sourdough and tour notorious Alcatraz Island

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: In Paris, we'll cruise the Seine River, pay a visit to Napoleon's tomb, and take in the majestic Louvre. Then we'll shop in a village-like neighborhood, attend church in a pipe organ loft, and celebrate Bastille Day.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: In this first of three shows focusing on European travel skills, we'll visit the Netherlands and Germany to learn about transportation by train and car, changing money, and settling in upon arrival.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: We'll ride a unicorn into the Middle Ages at Paris' Cluny Museum, get a heavenly look at stained glass in Sainte-Chapelle, go on a tombstone pilgrimage at Père Lachaise Cemetery, and savor the Parisian café scene.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Western Turkey
programme.desc: After kicking off in Kusadasi, we wander ancient Ephesus, soak in a natural spa at Pamukkale, learn why dervishes whirl at Konya, and sail the Mediterranean on a "gulet" from Antalya.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: In this gilt-covered special, explore the world's greatest palaces. From Buckingham Palace in London to the Hawa Mahal in India, discover how their noble residents have spent time and money to bring new meaning to the notion of luxury.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: From the surprises of colorful reef characters to effervescent penguins, killer sharks, and regal whales, dive into the places where nature reveals itself in some of its most marvelous and bizarre forms.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: A bridge is a structure that’s designed to transcend, but a great bridge can define the place where it stands. Symbols of human ingenuity, beauty, and grandeur, bridges connect us not only to each other but also to the past.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: Multiplicity

programme.desc: Val Kilmer, Sam Shepard and Graham Greene star in this murder mystery filled with style and suspense. Kilmer stars as Ray Levoi, a hotshot FBI agent who's thrust into a strange new world when he is sent to solve a murder on an Indian reservation.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La venganza y el odio llevan a los hermanos del Monte a enfrentarse entre ellos, cuando José intenta sacar del medio a Paula y a su madre a empujones. No saben que Juan saldrá en su defensa. Efraín descubre el romance a sus espaldas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José asume su responsabilidad de padre al rescatar a su hijo cuando Efraín intenta llevárselo por celos y rabia, mientras Paula y Julieta se enfrentan de nuevo. Juan le dice a Paula que está decidido a casarse y que cumplirá con irse de la casa.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José no quiere compromisos con Beatriz y cuando ella guarda la esperanza de una nueva vida al lado del hombre que ama, él la pone en su lugar. Julieta le propone a Juan vivir con sus padres mientras terminan de construir la casa donde vivirán.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Pedro no logra persuadir a Julieta para que no se case. Así que, mientras al novio le organizan la despedida de soltero, él prepara una cámara para dejar pruebas en secreto de un juego romántico e irresistible que Paula le tiene preparado a Juan.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Verónica y horas más tarde recibe una carta de Gabriela donde dice: “Te perdono”. Constanza quiere demostrar que Antonia es cómplice de Aníbal Villegas. El senador tiene las cuentas congeladas. Guerra prepara una coartada.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Gabriela y se ofrece para reparar el daño, atestiguando en contra de Antonia. Lagarto también podría ser un testigo clave. Ricardo hace el amor con Inés y les toman fotografías. Patricia recibe las fotos y llora de rabia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Patricia hace un discurso memorable contra Antonia y despierta la admiración de todos. Aníbal pronto estará de alta, pero le ofrece dinero al médico para que lo deje en el hospital. Lucho Vampa le roba a Antonia y Rodrigo corta relaciones con ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro golpea con una rabia descontrolada a Macario y termina en la comisaría. Por ahora, no podrá salir de prisión. Constanza y Gastón encuentran un sobre con la llave de una bóveda de un banco y una tarjeta electrónica con la foto de Antonia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Todos hablan de la boda de Juan y Norma, Belinda se convierte en la informante de Dínora, quien prepara un regalo muy explosivo. Gabriela confronta a Fernando sobre la venta de la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: A sabiendas de sus planes, Rosario le pide a Dínora que incluya a Franco y Sara en su regalo de bodas. Carmela quema el traje militar que Martín usaría para llevar a Norma al altar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma sugiere cambiar la iglesia donde se hará la boda. Bajo gran tensión, Franco y Eva se empeñan en hacer un evento inolvidable, los empleados le hacen la despedida de soltero a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela mira de lejos la boda y observa cuando Dínora dispara contra la multitud, la policía persigue a la asesina y Rosario llega al lugar del suceso, Gabriela sospecha de su complicidad.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.
